name: AfdxSetTokenInt
title: AfdxSetTokenInt
syntax: long AfdxSetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long value ); // form 1
long AfdxSetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, long networkByteOrder, long value ); // form 2
description: This function sets the specified token‘s data to a new integer value. With additional parameters (form 2) the user may specify the starting byte, length and byte ordering of the integer value in the token.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the token's data area. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 of the token's data area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the length of the integer value to be copied to the token's data area (range 1..4).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
